## Summary

{{One or two sentences describing the change.}}

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows naming convention: `<type>/<description>`.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials are included.
- [ ] No `.env` or `.env.*` files are committed.
- [ ] `.gitignore` correctly excludes env files.
- [ ] Public/private boundary is respected.
- [ ] README is updated if applicable.
- [ ] CHANGELOG is updated if applicable.
- [ ] Build passes.
- [ ] Lint passes.
- [ ] Tests pass (where applicable).
